name: Hershey's White Chips Almond Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sweetened Condensed Milk (not evaporated milk)
1 1/2 cups Chopped Slivered Almonds (coarsely chopped, toasted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square pan with foil, extending foil over the edges of the pan.
2. In a medium saucepan over very low heat, melt white chips and sweetened condensed milk, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in almonds and vanilla extract.
4. Spread into prepared pan. Cover; refrigerate 2 hours or until firm.
5. Use foil to lift fudge out of pan; peel off foil.
6. Cut fudge into squares. About 3 dozen pieces or 1-1/2 pounds fudge.
To toast almonds: Spread almonds on a cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F, stirring occasionally, for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned; cool.
